title: 메인 브랜치 작업 금지 — 스크립트 자동 분기 + 훅 + 규칙
policy_note: explicit 'modifies existing behavior' per harvest-policy (git.md Branches section replaced); cannot auto-apply; requires explicit 2차 승인 (PENDING path)

fitness.rationale: scripts auto-create task/epic branches, pre-commit hook blocks main commits, enforceable via exit codes

user_approval: 2026-04-10T08:10Z — explicit approval incl. auto-merge on APPROVE
applied_changes: run-task.sh: setup_task_branch() creates task/{slug} when on main (standalone mode only, skipped when EPIC_NAME set by parent); finalize_task_branch() auto ff-only merge + push + delete on APPROVE
run-epic.sh: setup_epic_branch() creates epic/{RUN_ID} at startup; finalize_epic_branch() auto-merges on successful completion
pre-commit-branch-check.sh: new PreToolUse Bash hook, parses TOOL_INPUT for 'git commit', exits 2 with clear stderr when on main/master; HARVEST_ALLOW_MAIN=1 bypass
settings.json: hook registered in PreToolUse Bash list after block-dangerous.sh
git.md Branches section rewritten: task/epic branch required, main is merge-only, pre-commit hook enforcement documented
behavior_changes: BEFORE: run-task.sh/run-epic.sh operated on whatever branch user was on (typically main); git.md explicitly allowed solo main commits
AFTER: scripts auto-isolate; main is commit-blocked by hook; HARVEST_ALLOW_MAIN=1 is the only legitimate bypass

self_test_results.hook_self_test: 4/4 cases (non-commit pass, git-status pass, commit-on-main BLOCK exit 2, bypass PASS)
